pool.baseline: everything is just so quiet now. i walk through the house and it feels like i'm just a ghost wandering around. there's no point to any of it, honestly. i wake up, i eat, i stare at the wall... it's just empty. i don't even know why i'm still doing this.

pool.baseline: i was just looking at some photos of deep space cosmics or whatever and it just hit me... like, in a billion years everything is just gonna be gone. every single thing we ever did, every person that ever lived, it's all just a temporary glitch in a vacuum that doesn't even care. it feels so pointless to even try anymore. why bother with anything if the end result is just nothingness?

pool.baseline: The candle flickers its last, much like the light in my soul. He is gone, and with him, the very reason the sun dares to rise. It feels as though the fog of this London night is creeping into my very chest, slowing my heart, whispering that there is no point in fighting the tide anymore. I am so weary... I feel as though I am merely a ghost waiting for my body to realize it is already dead.
